suggestions.label: How much budget do I need next quarter?
Which office has the highest failure rate?
How much e-waste did we prevent this year?

responses.default: I'm here to help you manage your device fleet smarter. Could you tell me a bit more about what you're looking for?
responses.risk: Right now 38 devices are flagged high risk, mostly ThinkPad T14 Gen 3 and ThinkBook 15 G4 units showing battery degradation or SSD wear. Want me to open the filtered device list?
responses.budget: Based on current failure predictions, I'd plan for roughly ₹11.8 Lakhs in repair costs over the next 30 days, plus battery and SSD replacements already flagged in today's action plan — about ₹3.2 Lakhs if you act on them now instead of later.
responses.location: Bengaluru Office currently has the highest concentration of high-risk devices, largely driven by SSD health issues. Mumbai HQ follows closely due to battery degradation across an older laptop batch.
responses.sustainability: This year the fleet has prevented an estimated 180 kg of e-waste and avoided 320 kg of CO2 by extending device lifespans through predictive maintenance instead of early replacement.
